questionHtml:
With which do most acids react?

   I. sodium hydrogen carbonate
   II. magnesium
   III. calcium sulfate

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: With which do most acids react? I. sodium hydrogen carbonate II. magnesium III. calcium sulfate A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
